shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Snow Showers Likely
name: Tonight
detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 11pm and midnight, then snow showers likely between midnight and 1am, then rain showers likely between 1am and 3am. Mostly cloudy. Low around 33, with temperatures rising to around 40 overnight. South wind 9 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
